description: Emergency plumber matching network connecting customers with vetted, local plumbers 24/7
business_model: Lead-matching network — connects emergency plumber leads to qualified local plumbers

differentiators.twenty_four_seven_detail: Day or night, weekends or bank holidays — ready to respond when you need us most
differentiators.transparent_pricing_detail: Clear, upfront quote before any work begins. No hidden fees or surprise charges.
differentiators.workmanship_guarantee_detail: If something isn't right, we come back and put it right at no extra cost.
differentiators.communication_detail: Constant communication with customers until the job is done.
differentiators.vetted_network_detail: All plumbers in our network are qualified, Gas Safe registered, and fully insured.
differentiators.key_differentiator: Network of vetted emergency plumbers available 24/7 with transparent pricing and guaranteed workmanship

notes: Starting with Hinckley. Will expand to other major UK cities later. UK business — use UK English, UK address formats, UK phone format.
